FYI How To Help
Your Friends
Invite other gym owners to grow the community and get paid
for it.
How to refer others and get credit.
If you needed help, wouldn't you want someone to tell you.
Details on Referring Like a Boss.
← Previous Topic
Topic Progress:
← Back to Lesson
How to Refer Like a Bo$$
1. 	Send them the “Gym Launch Application” link from the button above for FREE Case Studies explaining how 5 gyms Converted Into
Hybrid Online Gyms In Less Than 30 Days…
2. 	Then tell them to click the button to apply on the next page.
3. 	Make sure they put YOUR name in the referral box so we can give you money.
4. 	Once your referral has:
Signed a Gym Launch Hybrid agreement,
Successfully paid 6 payments of $599 (USD), AND
Has been in the program for 6 full weeks,
…you will be eligible for $1,000 (USD).
Successfully paid 12 payments of $599 (USD), AND
Has been in the program for 12 full weeks,
…you will be eligible for an additional $1,000 (USD).
5. 	When the time comes the Gym Launch Billing team will reach out to you to begin the payout process.
We will request a few forms through Docusign:
A W-9 form
(US Only) An ACH form for direct deposits
(Int’l) Your PayPal information
Forms are requested weekly following referral eligibility. The sooner you return them, the sooner you get paid.
Once forms are returned, all payments should be received within 7-10 business days (subject to bank processing times).
NOTES:
Referral funds cannot be used as credits on your Gym Launch account.
Should you exit the program before a referral comes due, you will no longer be eligible for that commission.
Questions about a referral or payout? Contact Gym Launch Billing via email → billing@gymlaunchsecrets.com
Mark Complete
